risk_if_not_implemented: Without Dynamic Reconfiguration, systems may operate with insecure settings or unauthorized changes, expanding the attack surface.

compensating_control_1.name: Incident Response Plan (IRP)
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to maintain and make available a current and viable Incident Response Plan (IRP) to all stakeholders.
compensating_control_1.justification: Incident Response Plan (IRP) (IRO-04) provides incident response capability that compensates for the absence of Dynamic Reconfiguration (IRO-02.3) by enabling timely detection, containment, and recovery from security events in the absence of the primary control. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Incident Handling
compensating_control_2.justification: Incident Handling (IRO-02) provides incident response capability that compensates for the absence of Dynamic Reconfiguration (IRO-02.3) by enabling timely detection, containment, and recovery from security events in the absence of the primary control. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
